name: libjansson4
title: libjansson4
summary: C library for encoding, decoding and manipulating JSON data
description:
C library for encoding, decoding and manipulating JSON data
Jansson is a C library for encoding, decoding and manipulating JSON data.
.
It features:
* Simple and intuitive API and data model
* Comprehensive documentation
* No dependencies on other libraries
* Full Unicode support (UTF-8)
* Extensive test suite
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libjansson4 because C library for encoding, decoding and manipulating JSON data.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libjansson4 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libjansson4 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libjansson4 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
